title: stimoryne littoralis
intro: Stimoryne littoralis, also known as Sea Lavender, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stimoryne littoralis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and relieving stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Sea Lavender include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system.
